3268560.name: Aileronia
3268560.description:
Welcome to Aileronia: A Skybound Realm of Heroes and Legends

 

Aileronia is a legendary realm where real aviation heroes and fantastical characters unite in their passion for the skies. Fueled by Essentia - a mystical energy born of courage and love - Aileronia flourishes under the watchful protection of its fearless guardians, the Aileronauts, who defend the skies and safeguard the Essentia that sustains their world.

 

For ages, Aileronia knew only peace. But this harmony shatters when the sinister drifters invade, seizing sacred lands to brew a vile, addictive slur called Metus — a dark concoction of fear and greed. At the helm of this invasion is Aranka, a ruthless commander who uses Metus to enslave her followers.

 

Her twisted ambition? To corrupt the sacred Essence, seize control of Aileronia’s heart, and bend its people to her will.

 

Step into the Skies as an Aileronaut

 

Take flight in thrilling missions to defend Aileronia and drive back the invaders. Unite with other Aileronauts, delve into their ancient lore, and absorb the timeless ideals. Through each mission, your courage and skill grow – until you, too, stand among the ranks of Aileronia’s mightiest defenders.

 

Are you ready to rise as an Aileronaut? The skies await your call.
